area_description: Knowledge Graphs and LLMs encompasses techniques at the intersection of structured knowledge representations and large language models, including using LLMs to construct and complete knowledge graphs, augmenting LLMs with knowledge graph grounding, graph-based question answering, and aligning heterogeneous knowledge sources.

categories.name: KG Construction with LLMs
categories.description: Methods that leverage LLMs to automatically build knowledge graphs from unstructured or semi-structured text, including extracting entities, relations, events, and learning ontological structures.

sub_topics.name: Entity Extraction
sub_topics.description: Using LLMs to identify and classify named entities and concepts from text for knowledge graph population.

sub_topics.name: Relation Extraction
sub_topics.description: Extracting semantic relationships between entities from text using LLMs, including open and closed information extraction.

sub_topics.name: Ontology Learning
sub_topics.description: Using LLMs to discover and organize ontological structures, including class hierarchies, property definitions, and taxonomic relations.

sub_topics.name: Event Extraction
sub_topics.description: Identifying event triggers, arguments, and temporal structures from text using LLMs for event-centric knowledge graphs.

categories.name: KG-enhanced LLMs
categories.description: Approaches that integrate knowledge graph information into LLMs to improve generation quality, factual grounding, and reasoning capabilities, including retrieval-augmented and pretraining-based methods.

sub_topics.name: KG-Augmented Generation
sub_topics.description: Retrieving structured knowledge from knowledge graphs at inference time to augment LLM generation with factual and relational context.

sub_topics.name: KG-Grounded Reasoning
sub_topics.description: Using knowledge graph structure and paths to ground and constrain LLM reasoning, reducing hallucination and improving faithfulness.

sub_topics.name: Entity-Aware Pretraining
sub_topics.description: Incorporating entity and relational knowledge from knowledge graphs into LLM pretraining or continued training to improve knowledge representation.

categories.name: KG Completion and Reasoning
categories.description: Techniques for predicting missing facts, learning graph embeddings, and discovering logical rules in knowledge graphs, increasingly leveraging LLMs for textual understanding and inductive generalization.

sub_topics.name: Link Prediction with LLMs
sub_topics.description: Using LLMs to predict missing links in knowledge graphs by leveraging textual descriptions, entity names, and contextual information.

sub_topics.name: KG Embedding with LLM
sub_topics.description: Combining knowledge graph embedding methods with LLM representations to learn richer entity and relation embeddings.

sub_topics.name: Rule Learning
sub_topics.description: Discovering logical rules and inference patterns from knowledge graphs, optionally using LLMs for rule verbalization and induction.

categories.name: KG Question Answering
categories.description: Methods for answering natural language questions by querying and reasoning over knowledge graphs, including semantic parsing, multi-hop reasoning, and hybrid LLM-KG approaches.

sub_topics.name: KGQA with LLMs
sub_topics.description: Using LLMs to interpret questions and retrieve or reason over knowledge graph subgraphs to produce answers.

sub_topics.name: Text-to-SPARQL
sub_topics.description: Translating natural language questions into SPARQL or other graph query languages using LLMs for precise knowledge graph querying.

sub_topics.name: Multi-hop KGQA
sub_topics.description: Answering complex questions that require traversing multiple edges in a knowledge graph, combining multi-step reasoning with graph navigation.

categories.name: KG Alignment and Integration
categories.description: Techniques for matching, aligning, and merging entities and schemas across heterogeneous knowledge graphs and data sources, often using LLM-based semantic matching.

sub_topics.name: Entity Alignment
sub_topics.description: Identifying equivalent entities across different knowledge graphs using LLM-based textual similarity and structural features.

sub_topics.name: Schema Matching
sub_topics.description: Aligning ontological schemas and relation types across knowledge graphs using LLMs for semantic correspondence.

sub_topics.name: Knowledge Fusion
sub_topics.description: Merging and reconciling information from multiple knowledge sources, resolving conflicts, and producing unified knowledge representations.

theme.name: Biomedical Knowledge Graphs
theme.description: Papers focused on biomedical and clinical knowledge graphs, including drug-gene interactions, disease ontologies, and medical knowledge extraction.

theme.name: Commonsense Knowledge
theme.description: Papers addressing commonsense knowledge graphs and reasoning, including everyday world knowledge and social norms.

theme.name: Temporal Knowledge
theme.description: Papers on temporal knowledge graphs, including time-aware reasoning, event ordering, and dynamic knowledge graph updates.

theme.name: Analysis
theme.description: Papers where experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of baseline solutions, showing gaps and future directions.

theme.name: Benchmark
theme.description: Papers that introduce new benchmark datasets and evaluation metrics.

theme.name: Application
theme.description: Papers that show how to apply the techniques to a specific domain or task, highlighting its strengths and gaps.

theme.name: Survey
theme.description: Papers that provide a comprehensive overview of the current state of the art, including its taxonomy, advantages and limitations.
